violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment has employees certified in a food safety management through an approved course. One employee must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

Ambient temperature of dessert slide cold hold was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Dessert observed at 44 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS food products were moved to the 3-door reach-in unit. Service call placed. No TCS foods/drinks are to be stored in this unit until it is serviced and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

Individual cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the condenser fan guards in walk-in #2 have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Fan guards are to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

Taco beef was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
Utensils (grill spatulas) were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. In use utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
The floor near the service line, in front of the 3-door reach-in, is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024
